# SourceFlow

A source-to-pay procurement platform for mid-market and enterprise buying
teams. SourceFlow manages purchase orders end to end and performs
three-way match between the purchase order, the goods receipt, and the
supplier invoice before any payment is released, keeping segregation of
duties intact across the approval chain.

New vendors are screened against OFAC sanctions lists during onboarding,
and buyers can run a competitive RFP process to turn a sourcing need into
an awarded contract. Employees submit requisitions that route through
configurable approval thresholds, and catalog shopping is supported via
punchout and cXML integration with supplier storefronts — so spend stays
visible for spend-management reporting instead of going around procurement
as maverick spend.

## Installation

npm install
npm run dev
